name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Small Peekaboo I See U Series
A stunning handmade bag series. Italian original grain Togo calf leather, paired with fully imported custom wax thread and pure hand-stitched outer seams, classic Selleria stitching, top-tier French original water-based oil edges, perfectly combined by hand. Can be carried or slung. A super heavy-craftsmanship classic piece!
Size Small 23/12/18cm
